channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BFFL] Grameva Ltd Appoints Sachin Pilania as Secretarial Auditor for FY26-27
item.description:
Grameva Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 11, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Sachin Pilania, a Practising Company Secretary (COP No.: 14154), as the Secretarial Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-2027. Mr. Pilania is tasked with undertaking a comprehensive audit of the Company’s statutory and regulatory compliances, corporate governance framework, and secretarial records in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013, SEBI regulations, and other applicable laws. The term of this appointment is for one year. The board meeting commenced at 12:30 P.M. and concluded at 1:12 P.M.

  • Grameva Ltd appointed Mr. Sachin Pilania as Secretarial Auditor.
  • The appointment is for the Financial Year 2026-2027.
  • Mr. Pilania will ensure compliance with corporate governance.
  • The term of appointment for the auditor is one year.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bangalore Fort Farms Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [ANZEN] Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust appoints Vijayanand Semletty as Additional Director
item.description:
Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust (Anzen) has announced the appointment of Mr. Vijayanand Semletty as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent) to its Investment Manager, EAAA Real Assets Managers Limited (formerly Edelweiss Real Assets Managers Limited). The appointment, effective April 10, 2026, was approved by the Board of Directors based on the Nomination and Remuneration Committee's recommendation, aligning with InvIT Regulations. Mr. Semletty brings over 25 years of experience in the power sector, including business development, commercial & regulatory, asset management, power plant operations, transmission, and distribution. His previous associations include Tata Power, Reliance Infra, and CLP India before joining EAAA in 2018. He holds a Bachelor's in Electrical Engineering and an MBA in Finance.

  • Anzen Trust appoints Vijayanand Semletty as Additional Director.
  • Appointment effective April 10, 2026, for Investment Manager.
  • Semletty brings 25+ years of power sector experience.
  • His expertise covers business development, operations, and regulation.
  • Appointment aligns with InvIT Regulations, strengthening governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust | Category: Management Change

item.title: [OMEGAIN] Omega Interactive Technologies shifts registered office in Mumbai
item.description:
Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd announced the shifting of its registered office, effective April 11, 2026. The Board of Directors approved this move on April 11, 2026. The registered office has relocated from E-308, Crystal Plaza, New Link Road, Andheri (West), Mumbai 400053, to SH 607, 6th Floor, Town Centre Commercial Premise Centre Marol, Andheri (East), Mumbai 400059. This change was made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Company's registered office moved within Mumbai.
  • New address is SH 607, 6th Floor, Town Centre Commercial, Andheri (East).
  • The change was approved by the Board on April 11, 2026.
  • Effective date for the new registered office is April 11, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMEGA INTERACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [ACC] ACC receives ₹59.8 Cr GST demand order, plans to appeal
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ACC Ltd has received an order dated April 10, 2026, from the Joint Commissioner Taxpayer Services Circle, Thalassery, under Section 74 of the CGST/KSGST Act, 2017. The order demands ₹59,80,58,854/-, which includes interest and penalty. The alleged violations include excess availment of Input Tax Credit (ITC), irregular deduction of post-supply discounts, availment of blocked ITC, and non-reversal of ITC on goods lost where insurance compensation was received. ACC plans to contest the order before the appropriate authorities and states that it does not foresee any material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities.

  • ACC received a GST demand order of ₹59.8 crore.
  • The order includes interest and penalty for alleged ITC violations.
  • Company plans to appeal the order within the prescribed timeline.
  • ACC does not anticipate a material financial or operational impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACC LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [BFFL] Grameva approves ₹2.85 Cr investment for new farming & feed units
item.description:
Grameva Ltd's Board of Directors approved the commencement of four new business units on April 11, 2026. These include a Layer Farming Unit, a Feed Mill Unit, a Piggery Unit, and an Aqua Products Fish Trading Business. The Layer Farming Unit, focusing on egg production, is expected to cost approximately ₹2.20 Crores, offering regular income and high market demand. The Feed Mill Unit, supporting various farming sectors, will require an estimated investment of ₹65 Lakhs, promising cost savings and higher profitability. Both investments, totaling ₹2.85 Crores, will be funded through internal accruals. The new ventures aim to diversify revenue streams and enhance operational efficiency within the agriculture and allied activities sector.

  • Board approved commencement of Layer Farming, Feed Mill, Piggery, and Aqua Products units.
  • Total estimated investment for Layer Farming and Feed Mill is ₹2.85 Crores.
  • All new investments will be entirely funded through internal accruals.
  • New units aim to diversify revenue streams and enhance operational efficiency.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bangalore Fort Farms Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SJCORP] SJ Corp gets BSE nod for listing 3.5 Cr preferential equity shares
item.description:
SJ Corporation Ltd has received listing approval from BSE Limited for 3,50,00,000 equity shares. These shares, with a face value of Re. 1 each, were issued at a price of ₹12 per share (including a premium of ₹11) on a preferential basis to both promoters and non-promoters. The BSE's approval letter, dated April 10, 2026, confirms the listing permission. The company is required to ensure compliance with SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, including filing shareholding patterns if changes exceed 2% of total paid-up capital. Trading approval will be granted upon submission of NSE listing approval (if applicable) and confirmation letters from NSDL/CDSL regarding share crediting and lock-in. SJ Corporation must apply for trading approval within seven working days from the listing approval date.

  • BSE granted listing approval for 3.5 crore equity shares of SJ Corporation.
  • Shares were issued at ₹12 each on a preferential basis.
  • Allotment was made to both promoters and non-promoters.
  • Trading approval requires further submissions, including depository confirmations.
  • Company must apply for trading approval within seven working days.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SJ CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [TITAANIUM] Titaanium Ten Clarifies Price Movement is Market Driven
item.description:
Titaanium Ten Enterprise Ltd responded to a query from the exchange regarding its recent share price movement. The company confirmed that there are no major events, information, or price-sensitive developments that have a bearing on its operations or performance, which would require disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company stated that the price movement is purely market driven.

  • Company clarified recent share price movement to the exchange.
  • No undisclosed major events or price-sensitive information exist.
  • Company attributes price fluctuations solely to market forces.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Titaanium Ten Enterprise Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [BFFL] Grameva Board approves new business units & auditor appointments
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Grameva Ltd's Board of Directors, at their meeting on April 11, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Sachin Pilania as Secretarial Auditor and M/s. Tibrewalla & Associates as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. In a significant expansion of operations, the Board also sanctioned the commencement of several new business units: a Layer Farming Unit, a Feed Mill Unit, a Piggery Unit, and an Aqua Products Fish Trading Business. These strategic moves indicate the company's diversification into various agricultural and allied sectors, aiming to broaden its revenue streams and enhance market presence. The auditor appointments reinforce the company's commitment to robust corporate governance and compliance.

  • Board approved Secretarial and Internal Auditor appointments for FY27.
  • Company to commence Layer Farming and Feed Mill Units.
  • Piggery Unit and Aqua Products Fish Trading Business also approved.
  • New ventures signal expansion into diverse agricultural sectors.
  • Auditor appointments ensure compliance and governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Bangalore Fort Farms Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MCLOUD] Magellanic Cloud Appoints Ravi Janarthanan as Additional Director
item.description:
Magellanic Cloud Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Ravi Janarthanan (DIN: 02368598) as an Additional Director (Non-Executive, Non-Independent) of the Company, effective April 11, 2026. The appointment was approved by the Board of Directors in their meeting held on April 11, 2026. Mr. Janarthanan is an entrepreneur and global investor with experience across sectors such as aerospace & defence, artificial intelligence, and energy. He is associated with internationally operating business groups and brings expertise in strategy, innovation, and global collaborations. He is not debarred from holding the office of Director by any SEBI order or other authority.

  • Board approved Ravi Janarthanan as Additional Director.
  • Appointment effective from April 11, 2026.
  • Janarthanan brings expertise in strategy, innovation, global collaborations.
  • He has experience in aerospace, AI, and energy sectors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Magellanic Cloud Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RSSOFTWARE] R.S. Software Board to meet May 7 for Q4/FY26 Results
item.description:
R.S. Software (India) Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 11:30 AM. The main purpose of the meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for both the quarter and the financial year ending March 31, 2026. In accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, the trading window for Designated Persons and Insiders has been closed from April 1, 2026, until May 9, 2026 (inclusive).

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve Q4 and FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 9, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R.S.SOFTWARE INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
